name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, state


  coordinator = [id |-> 0, state |-> "INIT"];
  messages = <<>>;

actions
  Prepare:
    /\ coordinator.state = "INIT"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator.id, to |-> "ALL"])
    /\ coordinator.state' = "PREPARED"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, messages>>;

  VoteYes:
    /\ \E p \in participants: p.state = "INIT"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> p.id, to |-> coordinator.id])
    /\ p.state' = "VOTED_YES"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>;

  VoteNo:
    /\ \E p \in participants: p.state = "INIT"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> p.id, to |-> coordinator.id])
    /\ p.state' = "VOTED_NO"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>;

  Commit:
    /\ coordinator.state = "PREPARED"
    /\ \A p \in participants: p.state = "VOTED_YES"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator.id, to |-> "ALL"])
    /\ coordinator.state' = "COMMITTED"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, messages>>;

  Abort:
    /\ coordinator.state = "PREPARED"
    /\ \E p \in participants: p.state = "VOTED_NO"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator.id, to |-> "ALL"])
    /\ coordinator.state' = "ABORTED"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, messages>>;

  Receive:
    /\ \E msg \in messages: msg.to = "ALL" \/ msg.to = coordinator.id
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>;

  UpdateState:
    /\ \E msg \in messages: msg.type = "VoteYes" \/ msg.type = "VoteNo"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>;

  Deliver:
    /\ \E msg \in messages: msg.type = "Commit" \/ msg.type = "Abort"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>;

  Finalize:
    /\ coordinator.state = "COMMITTED" \/ coordinator.state = "ABORTED"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>;

  Next == \/ Prepare
          \/ VoteYes
          \/ VoteNo
          \/ Commit
          \/ Abort
          \/ Receive
          \/ UpdateState
          \/ Deliver
          \/ Finalize
*)

TypeOK == /\ coordinator.id \in Nat
          /\ coordinator.state \in {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
          /\ \A p \in participants: p.id \in Nat
          /\ \A p \in participants: p.state \in {"INIT", "VOTED_YES", "VOTED_NO"}
          /\ messages \in Seq([type |-> {"Prepare")

Init == /\ coordinator.state = "INIT"
        /\ \A p \in participants: p.state = "INIT"
        /\ messages = <<>>

Next == /\ \E msg \in messages:
          /\ msg.type = "Prepare" /\ coordinator.state' = "PREPARED" /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, messages>>
          \/ msg.type = "VoteYes" /\ \E p \in participants: p.id = msg.from /\ p.state' = "VOTED_YES" /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>
          \/ msg.type = "VoteNo" /\ \E p \in participants: p.id = msg.from /\ p.state' = "VOTED_NO" /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>
          \/ msg.type = "Commit" /\ coordinator.state' = "COMMITTED" /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, messages>>
          \/ msg.type = "Abort" /\ coordinator.state' = "ABORTED" /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, messages>>
          \/ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>> ==

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkHeldBy(i, j) == forks[i] = j

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
          /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ ForkHeldBy(LEFT(i), i)
          /\ ForkHeldBy(RIGHT(i), i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ ForkHeldBy(LEFT(i), i)
          /\ ForkHeldBy(RIGHT(i), i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
          /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = forks

(* Temporal specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : ForkFree(i) \/ ForkHeldBy(i, i)
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : PhilosopherThinking(i) \/ PhilosopherHungry(i) \/ PhilosopherEating(i)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ num[i] = 0
        /\ flag[i] = TRUE
        /\ LET maxNum == MAX [j \in 1..N |-> num[j]]
           IN num[i] = maxNum + 1
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N : /\ j \in 1..N
           /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j]) \div N]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + epsilon]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] - epsilon]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known[Len(infected) + 1])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  /\ turn' \in {0,1}
  /\ wants' \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ \E i \in {0,1} :
       /\ wants[i] = FALSE
       /\ turn' = i
       /\ wants' = [j \in {0..1} |-> IF j = i THEN TRUE ELSE wants[j]]
  \/ \E i \in {0..1} :
       /\ wants[i] = TRUE
       /\ turn' = 1 - i
       /\ wants' = [j \in {0..1} |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE wants[j]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

(* --type invariants
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

(* --specification
Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == \/ \E n \in Node : /\ counts[n][n] < 2^31
                 /\ counts[n][n] := counts[n][n] + 1
        \/ \E n, m \in Node : n /= m /\ counts[n][m] < counts[m][m]
                 /\ counts[n][m] := counts[m][m]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
*)

====
